headline: Stock Market Today, March 23: Super Micro Computer Jumps on Heavy Trading After Indictment
summary: On March 23, 2026, surging volume collided with fresh legal and governance shocks, forcing investors to reassess this AI‑server heavyweight.

headline: Super Micro stock target lowered at BofA after export-control indictment
summary: Investing.com -- Bank of America lowered its price target on Super Micro Computer to $24 from $34, citing increased risks after U.S. authorities indicted three individuals tied to the company over alleged export-control violations.

raw.headline: Super Micro stock target lowered at BofA after export-control indictment
